tips.peForward: Price/Earnings Forward — share price divided by expected earnings per share. Lower = cheaper.
tips.peTrailing: Price/Earnings Trailing — share price divided by last year's earnings per share.
tips.ebitdaMargin: Earnings before interest, tax, and depreciation as a share of revenue. Measures operating profitability.
tips.operatingMargin: Operating margin — operating income divided by revenue. Shows how much of each unit of revenue becomes profit.
tips.grossMargin: Gross margin — revenue minus cost of goods, divided by revenue. Higher = better pricing power.
tips.revenueGrowth: Revenue growth compared to the previous year.
tips.roic: Return on Invested Capital. Shows how efficiently the company uses its capital.
tips.debtEbitda: Net debt divided by EBITDA. Above 3x is considered highly leveraged.
tips.dividendYield: Dividend yield — annual dividend divided by the share price. Higher = more cash returned each year.
